mapper.sql: select r.report_id, r.report_no, r.title, r.report_type, r.status, r.content, r.user_id, r.dept_id, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, u.nick_name, d.dept_name from biz_report r left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.select:
r.del_flag = '0'
AND r.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND r.report_type = #{reportType}
AND r.status = #{status}
AND r.report_no like concat('%', #{reportNo}, '%')
AND date_format(r.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(r.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by r.create_time desc
mapper.update:
update biz_report set del_flag = '2' where report_id in
#{reportId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from biz_report where del_flag = '0'
select count(*) from biz_report where del_flag = '0' and status = #{status}
select count(*) from biz_report where del_flag = '0' and date_format(create_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y%m')
select status as name, count(*) as value from biz_report where del_flag = '0' group by status

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') as month, count(*) as count from biz_report where del_flag = '0' and create_time >= date_sub(sysdate(), interval #{months} month) group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by month
